channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe were voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Luka Doncic is now more likely to make his Lakers debut on Monday, JJ Redick says
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic is now expected to make his debut with the Los Angeles Lakers on Monday night against the Utah Jazz, coach JJ Redick says. Doncic hasn't played since Christmas due to a strained left calf.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Marcus Jordan breaks silence after drug possession arrest in Florida
item.description: Marcus Jordan, the son of NBA great Michael Jordan, broke his silence on social media Thursday after he was arrested in Florida on multiple charges, including drug possession.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The trade deadline in the NBA has come and gone. Time for the dust to settle
item.description: The final numbers from the trade deadline: no fewer than eight current and past All-Stars, some of them recent All-NBA selections, some among the league's highest scorers and even three Olympic gold medalists, all headed to new homes. Luka Doncic and Anthony Davis got blindsided by a blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NCAA changes transgender policy to limit women's competition to athletes assigned female at birth
item.description: The NCAA changed its participation policy for transgender athletes on Thursday, limiting competition in women's sports to athletes who were assigned female at birth.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why you should never challenge the shirtless Old Spice Guy to a QB challenge
item.description: We learned the hard way that you should never challenge “The Man Your Man Could Smell Like” to a football-throwing duel.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Jeremiah Trotter Jr. continues legacy of Eagles Super Bowl linebackers
item.description: His dad, known as the "Ax Man" for his signature sack celebration, played eight seasons in Midnight Green and is a member of the team's Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Travis Kelce fined for unsportsmanlike conduct in AFC title game
item.description: While there was no flag thrown on the play, Kelce got hit with an $11,255 fine for unsportsmanlike conduct after a one-yard Mahomes rushing touchdown
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, NewsNation

item.title: Caleb Williams voted GQ's most stylish football player
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams has earned his first accolade since joining the NFL as the league's No. 1 overall pick last April. He took home GQ's fan vote for the Most Stylish Football Player Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: DeWanna Bonner will join the Indiana Fever, AP source says
item.description: DeWanna Bonner is headed to Indiana to join Caitlin Clark and the Fever, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Americans to spend 22% more on the Super Bowl this year: Survey
item.description: The LendingTree 2025 Super Bowl Spending Report survey covers everything from food and fan merch to sports betting.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: A 2,500th 3-pointer, a triple-double, Bronny's basket give LeBron James another memorable MSG game
item.description: A 2,500th 3-pointer for his career and his 10th triple-double this season. Not a bad 31st trip to Madison Square Garden for LeBron James. Pretty good first one for Bronny James, too.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A Blackhawks record: Landon Slaggert scores 7 seconds into a game against Florida
item.description: Landon Slaggert scored seven seconds into Chicago's game at the Panthers on Saturday afternoon — the fastest goal to start a game ever for the Blackhawks, according to the NHL record book.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl bettors in California have a workaround
item.description: Though Californians looking to place bets on the upcoming Super Bowl LIX are limited by state law banning the practice, a loophole appears to let bettors wager legally.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, Fox 5

item.title: Padres FanFest returns to Petco Park: what to know before you go
item.description: It's that time of year again: Padres FanFest is back and is expected to be bigger than ever, according to a spokesperson with the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Rowdies Forrest Lasso returns to field after season-ending injury
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) - The Tampa Bay Rowdies returned to the field this week for preseason and so did veteran defender Forrest Lasso. After scoring two goals May 18, 2024, Lasso was named Player of the Week for his performance.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC
